# Murali Sudireddy — Full Context

> AI & Full-Stack Engineer. Available for freelance and consulting. I build scalable backend systems, AI-powered applications, and real-world products end-to-end.

## Identity

Name: Murali Sudireddy
Location: Andhra Pradesh, India
Role: AI & Full-Stack Engineer. Available for freelance and consulting.
Resume: https://drive.google.com/file/d/14iZWUvdxyBsfS6CmKmzI0NCgyQWtxU7R/view?usp=sharing

## What Makes Murali Different

* Combines engineering with product thinking — builds systems while understanding user problems and business needs
* Builds full-stack products end-to-end across frontend, backend, databases, APIs, and AI integrations
* Interested in solving real-world problems through scalable systems, automation, and practical engineering
* Strong builder mindset focused on execution, iteration, and continuous learning
* Interested in product thinking, startup building, user understanding, and solving meaningful problems
* Builds practical systems instead of unnecessary complexity

## Detailed Experience

### Winqroo — Full-Stack Product

Influencer collaboration platform connecting brands and creators through intelligent discovery, search, and campaign workflows.

* Built full-stack workflows for creator onboarding, brand collaboration, campaign management, and discovery
* Worked on scalable backend systems, APIs, authentication, and data management
* Focused on improving creator-brand interactions through better workflows and platform usability
* Built product experiences around collaboration, onboarding, and business workflows

### Annseva — Social Impact Platform

Community-driven platform helping connect food donors, volunteers, and people in need through technology.

* Built workflows for food requests, coordination, and accessibility
* Focused on solving a meaningful real-world problem using practical engineering
* Worked on full-stack architecture, APIs, authentication, and scalable backend systems
* Designed the platform around accessibility, usability, and social impact

### PickAndPartner — AI-Powered Platform

AI-powered communication and workflow platform focused on conversational experiences and automation.

* Built intelligent workflows and AI-assisted communication systems
* Worked on backend logic, integrations, APIs, authentication, and scalable architecture
* Focused on automation, business workflows, and conversational experiences
* Explored AI integrations and product usability for practical business use cases

### Therabee — Therapy & Consultation Platform

Digital therapy platform designed to connect patients and therapists through virtual consultations and accessible care experiences.

* Built workflows enabling patients and therapists to join video consultations and manage therapy interactions
* Worked on appointment flows, authentication, backend systems, APIs, and platform usability
* Focused on creating seamless experiences for online therapy sessions, communication, and accessibility
* Built product experiences around virtual healthcare consultations, user workflows, and practical usability


### Nexcore — Developer Collaboration Platform

Developer collaboration and project management platform for discovering teammates, managing projects, and real-time communication.

* Built collaboration-focused workflows for project management and team discovery
* Worked on real-time communication, workspace interactions, and scalable product architecture
* Focused on improving developer collaboration and productivity experiences
* Built frontend and backend systems supporting team coordination workflows

## Technical Stack

TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, PHP, C++, React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, Prisma, Drizzle ORM, Docker, AWS, Cloudflare, Vercel, Git, GitHub, OpenAI APIs, LLM Integrations, REST APIs, Three.js, Figma, New Relic
